evidence.description: Sistani studied under al-Khoei in Najaf. After al-Khoei's death in August 1992, Sistani led his funeral prayers and gradually emerged as his successor as the leading marja in Najaf.

editorial_notes: Al-Khoei was Sistani's primary teacher and predecessor. Sistani succeeded him as senior marja in Najaf after al-Khoei's death in 1992.
